Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Truth be told, I do have some experience playing the piano.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Are you familiar with The Velvet Song?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Veeelvet, oh veeelvet~[n]My master has a looong nooose! ♪[cr][n]{f 1 1}
